name: Hershey's Syrup Lowfat Snacking Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a 13x9x2-inch baking pan with vegetable cooking spray.
2. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, melt the vegetable oil spread for 1 minute or until melted (use HIGH). Add sugar and stir. Add eggs one at a time, stirring after each addition until well mixed. Stir in syrup until blended. Gradually add flour and cocoa, beating until smooth.
3. Pour batter into prepared pan. Bake 30-35 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool completely on a wire rack.
4. Prepare drizzle (see below) and spoon over the brownies. Cut into bars. Makes 36 brownies.
Drizzle:
In a small bowl, mix powdered sugar with 1-2 tablespoons skim milk until thin enough to pour from the end of a spoon.
